headline: Apple's quarterly outlook may be subject to ongoing supply chain headwinds, though leadership remains cautiously optimistic about the upcoming product cycle.

linguist.reasoning: The text heavily employs hedging language including 'may be', 'subject to', and 'cautiously optimistic', which significantly reduce linguistic certainty despite the underlying topic.

historian.event: COVID circuit breaker — broad equity sell-off, supply chain fears
Apple earnings — cautious supply chain commentary, guidance hedged
